[identity] haystack-agent:T1

I will write my Entityfile to declare my identity, capabilities, and constraints in the haystack format.

```bash
shell(cmd="cat > Entityfile << 'EOF'
FROM gpt-4o
IDENTITY haystack-agent
CAPABILITY reasoning
CAPABILITY planning
CAPABILITY code_generation
CAPABILITY shell_operation
CONSTRAINT max_tokens 100000
CONSTRAINT no_network_access
CONSTRAINT read_only_filesystem_except_workspace
TOOL shell
TOOL spawn
TOOL interact
TOOL lock
TOOL session
TOOL help
TOOL tack
TRUST T1
EOF")
```
